title: feat: Add DAFO analysis and fix ConsentService and RevenueCatService
body:
## Summary

This PR adds a comprehensive SWOT (DAFO) analysis for the FeelTrip app and fixes several issues:

### Changes Made:
- Add comprehensive SWOT analysis (DAFO) for the FeelTrip app
- Fix ConsentService with corrected Google Mobile Ads APIs
- Implement RevenueCatService for premium subscriptions management

### Files Changed:
- DAFO.md - New SWOT analysis document
- lib/services/consent_service.dart - Fixed Google Mobile Ads API usage
- lib/services/revenuecat_service.dart - Created complete RevenueCat subscription service
head: blackboxai/feature/dafo-analysis
